Bus Timings

F18 Bus Schedule From Oud Metha Metro Station to Sunrise City Supermarket and Return

August 8, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

The F18 bus route in Dubai is a convenient option for those traveling within the city, particularly between Oud Metha Metro Station and Lamcy Plaza. Let’s dive into what makes the F18 bus route a preferred choice for many commuters.

The F18 bus route begins and ends at the Oud Metha Metro Station Terminus, making it a loop service that ensures frequent and reliable connectivity. This route covers several key stops including Oud Metha Road 1 and 2, American Hospital, Lamcy Plaza, Sunrise City Supermarket, Nasr Sports Club, and Rashid Hospital Roundabout?Contents

F18 Bus Timings

The F18 bus operates daily with a consistent schedule to accommodate passengers throughout the day. Buses run every 15 minutes, providing a dependable service for both early morning commuters and those traveling late into the evening??. And here is the detail of F18 bus timings, you can save the timetable on your phone.

From Oud Metha Metro Station From Sunrise City Supermarket
04:43 04:48
04:54 05:16
05:11 05:41
05:22 06:03
05:36 06:23
05:47 06:44
05:58 07:07
06:09 07:31
06:18 07:55
06:26 08:19
06:34 08:47
06:42 09:14
06:48 09:37
06:56 10:00
07:02 10:23
07:13 10:46
07:26 11:08
07:37 11:30
07:50 11:51
08:01 12:12
08:14 12:33
08:25 12:55
08:42 13:16
08:53 13:31
09:09 13:43
09:20 13:56
09:45 14:10
10:15 14:24
10:50 14:41
11:15 15:00
11:45 15:15
12:15 15:33
12:45 15:47
13:15 16:05
13:45 16:33
14:15 17:00
14:40 17:30
15:05 18:00
15:35 18:30
16:00 19:00
16:20 19:30
16:40 20:00
17:00 20:29
17:20 20:52
17:40 21:17
18:00 21:42
18:20 22:05
18:45 22:28
19:10 22:53
19:32 23:18
19:50 23:44
20:10 00:11

Download PDF Bus F18

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website or follow this link to access the F18 Bus Timings.## F18 Bus Route Landmarks

F18 bus past several icons of the city, some of them are below

Oud Metha Metro Station

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

This is a significant hub in Dubai’s public transportation network, situated on the Green Line of the Dubai Metro.

Mary’s Catholic Church, and the northern end of Creek Park?.

American Hospital

A prominent healthcare facility, providing easy access for patients, visitors, and staff.

Lamcy Plaza

A popular shopping destination, Lamcy Plaza offers a range of retail stores, dining options, and entertainment facilities. It’s a bustling stop for shoppers and those looking for leisure activities?

Nasr Sports Club

This stop caters to sports enthusiasts and those visiting the sports complex for events and activities.

Rashid Hospital Roundabout

The total distance covered by the F18 bus route is relatively short, ensuring quick and efficient travel between stops. The entire loop takes approximately 9 minutes to complete under normal traffic conditions, making it an expedient choice for intra-city travel?.## Journey Experience

The F18 bus route from Oud Metha Metro Station to Sunrise City Supermarket and back offers a long but diverse journey through various parts of Dubai. Starting at Oud Metha, a lively area known for its mix of residential and commercial spots, including attractions like Dubai Creek Park and the Egyptian-themed Wafi Mall, the bus passes through bustling neighborhoods like Karama, famous for its vibrant markets and eateries.

As the route continues, passengers are taken through quieter residential zones, providing a glimpse into the more suburban side of the city near Sunrise City Supermarket.

The F18 bus route is an essential part of Dubai’s public transport system, offering frequent and reliable service across key locations in the city. Whether you’re heading to a hospital, a shopping mall, or simply navigating through Oud Metha. The F18 bus ensures you get there efficiently. With its regular schedule, strategic stops, and real-time tracking, the F18 bus is a convenient option for both daily commuters and occasional travelers in Dubai?

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: August 8, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
